query: SELECT id, contactName, teamMemberName, status, duration, classification, recordingUrl, createdAt, updatedAt, source FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Michael Woody%' OR (teamMemberName LIKE '%Mirna Razo%' AND duration BETWEEN 25 AND 35 AND createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
